name: PartnerRe Ltd. 4.875% Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares Series J
summary: PartnerRe Ltd. 4.875% Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares Series J represents preferred stock issued by PartnerRe, a global reinsurer. These shares pay a fixed dividend rate and are redeemable by the company. PartnerRe is headquartered in Bermuda.
